title: Lemon's Wasps
body:
This pack replaces bees with equally cute wasps and honey with nectar.

No mods are required and the pack shouldn't override anything other than bees and bee-related items.

The resource pack most likely works with earlier and later versions, but I am once again too lazy to test it :P

All textures are made by me except for the beehive and honey block textures, which are edited from the vanilla textures.
